# Color Mix Lab

> A Kotlin Multiplatform color-mixing game for Android (Jetpack Compose) and iOS (SwiftUI), built entirely with AI tooling — no human-typed code.

The project demonstrates AI-assisted cross-platform mobile development. All Kotlin, Swift, Gradle, and CI configuration was generated by Claude Code through Cursor and the Claude Code CLI. The shared module owns the game state machine; platform UIs are thin Compose/SwiftUI wrappers.

## Technical scope

- 30 levels with progressively complex color recipes (2-5 ingredient colors)
- 15+ unlockable colors across 6 random tiers
- Math challenges as level gating (multiplication with pedagogically plausible distractors)
- Three difficulty modes (Easy / Medium / Hard) with timer-based scoring
- Local leaderboard with time-windowed queries (today / week / month / all-time)
- Atomic state mutations via `MutableStateFlow.update {}`
- Multi-phase particle celebration animation rendered via `DrawScope`

## Docs

- [README.md](README.md): Project overview, architecture, build instructions, FAQ.
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md): Module graph, state machine, engineering trade-offs.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): AI build retrospective. What worked, what didn't, lessons learned.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup and contribution guide.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Version history.
- [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md): Future work and known gaps.
- [docs/reproduce.md](docs/reproduce.md): Example prompts to rebuild the project from scratch.
- [docs/adr/](docs/adr/): Architecture Decision Records for major technical choices.

## Code

- [shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/colormixlab/game/GameController.kt](shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/colormixlab/game/GameController.kt): The central state machine.
- [shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/colormixlab/game/GameState.kt](shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/colormixlab/game/GameState.kt): Immutable state snapshot consumed by both platforms.
- [shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/colormixlab/game/ColorMixer.kt](shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/colormixlab/game/ColorMixer.kt): RGB averaging and similarity calculation.
- [shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/colormixlab/data/LeaderboardManager.kt](shared/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/colormixlab/data/LeaderboardManager.kt): Time-windowed leaderboard CRUD.
- [app/src/main/java/com/colormixlab/MainActivity.kt](app/src/main/java/com/colormixlab/MainActivity.kt): Android entry point with sealed Screen routing.
- [iosApp/ColorMixLab/ColorMixLab/ColorMixLabApp.swift](iosApp/ColorMixLab/ColorMixLab/ColorMixLabApp.swift): iOS entry point.

## Tests

- [app/src/test/](app/src/test/): 100+ JUnit tests covering shared game logic.
- Coverage report via `./gradlew koverHtmlReport`.

## Optional

- [docs/dev-notes/](docs/dev-notes/): 54 markdown files generated by the AI during development. Real-time development journal.
- [config/detekt/detekt.yml](config/detekt/detekt.yml): Detekt static analysis config.
- [.github/workflows/](.github/workflows/): CI, CodeQL, OpenSSF Scorecard, release workflows.
